entry.title: UBCIT eSAM Servers Maintenance May 27, 2026, 20:00-23:00 PT
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT May 27, 20:00 - 23:00 PDT

May 5, 12:12 PDT
Scheduled - UBCIT will be performing maintenance on the eSAM component and vault servers on May 27, 2026, 20:00-23:00 PT. This change will affect both UBC campuses.

Users will intermittently not be able to login to any servers managed by eSAM, nor retrieve any credentials via the eSAM Web UI throughout the maintenance window.

Any connections terminated while a component is being rebooted can be reconnected to the secondary node. All connections will be terminated and users won't be able to reconnect while we patch the vault servers (which typically lasts around 30 minutes) during this window.

entry.title: TouchNet TEST site (uCommerce 9.5) Scheduled Maintenance May 22, 2026 05:00 to 17:00 PT
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT May 22, 05:00 - 17:00 PDT

Apr 20, 10:17 PDT
Scheduled - The TouchNet TEST site will be undergoing scheduled maintenance. During the update window the TouchNet TEST site will be offline for logging in by staff as a TouchNet user and for making TEST payments.

For any questions please contact dpp.support@ubc.ca

entry.title: UBC Vancouver Campus Network Maintenance May 16, 2026, 07:00-15:00 PT
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT May 16, 07:00 - 15:00 PDT

Apr 21, 14:27 PDT
Scheduled - The UBC Vancouver campus network will undergo maintenance on May 16, 2026, 07:00-15:00 PT. During the maintenance window, intermittent disruptions to network connectivity may be experienced, including internet, cloud services and remote VPN access.

entry.title: Workday Scheduled Quarterly Maintenance and Weekly Service Update May 15, 2026, 21:00 PT to May 16, 2026, 08:00 PT
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT May 15, 21:00 PDT  -  May 16, 08:00 PDT

May 11, 10:53 PDT
Scheduled - Please be advised that on May 15, 2026, 21:00 PT to May 16, 2026, 08:00 PT, Workday will be undergoing scheduled maintenance as part of its quarterly service update. During the scheduled maintenance period, Workday will be unavailable for use.
Learn about Workday Support at UBC and other available resources on isc.ubc.ca.

entry.title: UBC SharePoint Maintenance Friday, May 15, 2026 09:00 PT to 17:00 PT
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT May 15, 09:00 - 17:00 PDT

May 11, 11:09 PDT
Scheduled - On Friday, May 15, 2026 from 09:00 PT to 17:00 PT, the UBC SharePoint Software as a Service (SaaS) service will be undergoing maintenance. During this maintenance window, SharePoint sites will be accessible as no interruptions to the service are expected.

entry.title: TouchNet PROD Site Maintenance May 15, 2026 00:00 to 04:00 PT
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT May 15, 00:00 - 04:00 PDT

Apr 20, 10:14 PDT
Scheduled - The TouchNet PROD site will be undergoing scheduled maintenance. During the update window the TouchNet PROD site will be offline for logging in by staff as a TouchNet user and for customers making new payments. During this time when the payor clicks "pay now" TouchNet will display a screen informing the payor that the system is off line for maintenance and to try again after the system is back online.

For any questions please contact dpp.support@ubc.ca

entry.title: Totem Park (Qelexen House) Network Switch Replacement May 13, 2026 08:00 - May 13, 2026 16:00 PT
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT May 13, 08:00 - 16:00 PDT

May 12, 10:57 PDT
Scheduled - Network maintenance is being performed at the Totem Park (Qelexen House) Student Residence, involving replacement of aging network infrastructure. During this service window from May 13, 2026 08:00 - May 13, 2026 16:00 PT; network services will be interrupted briefly and intermittently while physical and logical changes are being performed on the network backbones and while the user ports are migrated to new switching infrastructure.

entry.title: University Endpoint Management System (UEMS) Issue May 12, 2026 08.15 PT
entry.content:
May 12, 08:14 PDT
Investigating - Late afternoon on May 11, an issue was identified affecting the University Endpoint Management System (UEMS). The system is currently undergoing maintenance while investigation and recovery work are in progress.
Impact
• No impact to existing managed windows device operations or day-to-day functionality
• Some services may be temporarily affected during this period

Status
Updates will be shared as more information becomes available and as restoration work progresses.

Thank you for your patience and understanding.

entry.title: Totem Park (Hem'lesem) Network Switch Replacement May 12, 2026 08:00 - May 12, 2026 16:00 PT
entry.content:
May 12, 08:00 PDT
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

May 11, 16:11 PDT
Update - We will be undergoing scheduled maintenance during this time.

May 11, 16:10 PDT
Scheduled - Network maintenance is being performed at the Hem'lesem House Student Residences, involving replacement of aging network infrastructure. During this service window from May 12, 2026 08:00 - May 12, 2026 16:00 PT; network services will be interrupted briefly and intermittently while physical and logical changes are being performed on the network backbones and while the user ports are migrated to new switching infrastructure.

During this service window from May 11, 2026 08:00 - May 11, 2026 16:00 PT; network services will be interrupted briefly and intermittently while physical and logical changes are being performed on the network backbones and while the user ports are migrated to new switching infrastructure.

entry.title: Wireless Network Maintenance May, 10 2026, 09:00 PT to 21:00 PT
entry.content:
May 10, 21:00 PDT
Completed - The scheduled maintenance has been completed.

May 10, 09:00 PDT
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

May 5, 14:51 PDT
Scheduled - The wireless team will be performing network maintenance from May, 10 2026, 09:00 PT to 21:00 PT. During this time, there may be an outage to the ubcvisitor WiFi network at the following sites:

- UBC Vancouver
- UBC Okanagan
- Robson Square
- Smaller remote sites where UBC IT managed wireless networks are available.

This change also impacts devices connected using the Wireless Device Registration Service (WDRS) and any manually registered IoT devices on ubcvisitor.

entry.title: OpenStack EduCloud Server Maintenance Vancouver May 10, 2026, 10:00 - 16:00 PT
entry.content:
May 10, 16:00 PDT
Completed - The scheduled maintenance has been completed.

May 10, 10:00 PDT
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

May 5, 14:42 PDT
Scheduled - The OpenStack EduCloud Server environment (https://educloud.ubc.ca) for projects hosted in Vancouver will be undergoing scheduled maintenance on May 10, 2026, 10:00-16:00 PT. There are no expected outages to running virtual machines and no impacts to the OpenStack EduCloud Server Administration Portal.

entry.title: Okanagan Campus Network Maintenance May 10, 2026 08:00 – 12:00 PT
entry.content:
May 10, 12:00 PDT
Completed - The scheduled maintenance has been completed.

May 10, 08:00 PDT
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

May 5, 12:08 PDT
Scheduled - Change Summary – UBCO Academic Access Network Software Upgrade
Scheduled Window: May 10, 2026, Sunday, between 8:00–12:00 PT.
Purpose: Software upgrade on Cisco Catalyst 9300 switches to apply security patches and address known vulnerabilities.
Upgrade Path: Cisco IOS-XE 17.12.04 → 17.15.5 (Cisco recommended release).
Impact: Brief, intermittent wired and wireless network interruptions may occur during the maintenance window in the listed buildings.
Buildings Affected: ART, ASC, CCF, CHP, COM, DAY, EDL, EME, FIP, GEO, IA1, IP1, KAL, LIB, LM Suite 600, UCH, OM1, PGF, SCI, UNI, QOT, PBV, NCH

entry.title: Okanagan Campus Network Maintenance May 9, 2026, 06:30 - 07:30 PT
entry.content:
May 9, 07:30 PDT
Completed - The scheduled maintenance has been completed.

May 9, 06:30 PDT
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

May 5, 14:50 PDT
Scheduled - The Okanagan campus will undergo network maintenance on May 9, 2026 between 06:30 - 07:30 PT. During this time the campus network will experience a 5-10 minute disruption of service.

entry.title: Workday Scheduled Weekly Maintenance May 08, 2026, 21:00 PT to May 09, 2026, 00:00 PT
entry.content:
May 9, 00:00 PDT
Completed - The scheduled maintenance has been completed.

May 8, 21:00 PDT
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

May 4, 09:17 PDT
Scheduled - Please be advised that on May 08 2026, 21:00 PT to May 09 2026, 00:00 PT, Workday will be undergoing scheduled maintenance as part of its weekly service update. The system will remain accessible during the scheduled maintenance period but it is advised not to run critical processes and tasks.
Learn about Workday Support at UBC and other available resources on isc.ubc.ca.

entry.title: Student Communication Tool - Thursday, May 7, 2026, 10:00 - May 8, 2026, 16:00 PT (No Outage)
entry.content:
May 8, 16:00 PDT
Completed - The scheduled maintenance has been completed.

May 7, 10:01 PDT
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

May 6, 14:22 PDT
Scheduled - Student Communication Tool - Thursday, 07 May 2026 10:00 - 08 May 2026 16:00 PT (No Outage)
Service Bulletin Content: Student Communication Tool (SCT)

Date & Time:

Deployment Activities: Thursday, 07 May 2026 10:00 – 11:00 PT
Validation activities: will continue until Friday, 08 May 2026 16:00


What is being deployed and why?
We are deploying minor fixes to the Custom Sender interface, including eliminating duplicate users, resolving freezing issues, and adjusting the default sender.

Key Improvements

SCT

Eliminates freezing issues and duplicate users, and updates the default sender for Staff members.

Who is impacted?

Primary Users:
No impacts.
System Impact & Availability
During Maintenance (120 minutes):

SCT will remain available
After Maintenance:

New features will be immediately available to staff members.
Detailed Feature Information
What is the new way of doing things?
For Student Communication Tool (SCT):

Before:


Sender Role Assignment page experienced freezing/lag.

Duplicate users appeared in the Custom Sender interface

Default sender was set to "No-reply email.



After:


Freezing/lag issues resolved.

Duplicate users removed from the Custom Sender interface.

Default sender updated to "Own email.

entry.title: UBC Websites - May 7, 2026, 16:45-17:15 PT
entry.content:
May 8, 13:26 PDT
Resolved - This incident has been resolved.

May 7, 17:31 PDT
Monitoring - Some UBC websites were temporarily unavailable from 16:45-17:15 PT. The issue has since been resolved and UBC IT technicians are monitoring performance.

entry.title: UBC IT myDNS Service Maintenance May 7, 2026, 17:00-18:00 PT
entry.content:
May 7, 18:00 PDT
Completed - The scheduled maintenance has been completed.

May 7, 17:00 PDT
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

May 5, 14:46 PDT
Scheduled - UBC IT will be performing maintenance on the myDNS Management Server on May 7, 2026, 17:00-18:00.
DNS/DHCP service will not be impacted but access to the myDNS management interface at https://mydns.ubc.ca will be unavailable for up to 40 minutes while maintenance is being performed.

entry.title: Enterprise Automation and Solution Delivery services maintenance for Scheduling Activity Transfer from May 7, 2026 8:00 -17:00
entry.content:
May 7, 17:00 PDT
Completed - The scheduled maintenance has been completed.

May 7, 08:00 PDT
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

May 6, 14:23 PDT
Scheduled - Enterprise Automation and Solution Delivery services maintenance for Scheduling Activity Transfer from May 7, 2026 8:00 -17:00

The EASD Team will be releasing software updates that may affect Scheduling services

During this maintenance window there may be a potential interruption to the apps and services for <30 min (between 3pm to 5pm)
Release activities will be completed between from May 7, 2026 8:00 - 17:00, validation will continue until 17:00.

Apps/Services:

Bug fixes / Enhancement for Scheduling Activity Transfer
Fixed course section in 2026W Term 2 where they have a start date of January 4th, when start of term should be the 5th

Impacts:

No other impacts to end users.

Reason for maintenance:

IRP Student: Scheduling Activity Transfer bug fixes

May 7, 16:00 PDT
Completed - The scheduled maintenance has been completed.

May 7, 12:30 PDT
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

May 7, 12:26 PDT
Scheduled - Network maintenance is being performed at the Margaret Mackenzie, Phyllis Ross and Okanagan Student Residences, involving replacement of aging network infrastructure. During this service window from May 7, 2026 08:00 - May 7, 2026 16:00 PT; network services will be interrupted briefly and intermittently while physical and logical changes are being performed on the network backbones and while the user ports are migrated to new switching infrastructure.

entry.title: Canvas Unavailable May 07, 2026 - 13:22 PT
entry.content:
May 12, 10:14 PDT
Update - .

May 11, 14:36 PDT
Update - While Instructure has made the Canvas service available again, UBC continues to review prior to providing access for the UBC community.

The university is working to maintain learning continuity for courses already underway as well as those starting later this week and will be contacting affected community members in the coming days regarding these courses. Students and instructors can find course information and resources, while Canvas is unavailable: https://ltic.ubc.ca/canvas-redirect/.

Students, please check your email from UBC regularly, as your instructor or department may contact you directly with updates or instructions.

We also recommend that faculty, staff, and students continue to be vigilant against phishing and follow best practices for protecting their accounts and data, including using strong passwords and enabling multi-factor authentication where available.

May 8, 13:05 PDT
Update - The university is working to maintain learning continuity for courses starting next week and will be contacting affected community members in the coming days.

As a precautionary measure, we are now advising UBC community members who use Canvas to take the following steps:

- Do not attempt to log into Canvas or Canvas Catalog until UBC IT advises that it is safe to do so; and
- If you logged into Canvas or Canvas Catalog after 12 p.m. PT on Thursday, May 7, please change your CWL password immediately and contact UBC Cybersecurity at security@ubc.ca. Community members can change their CWL password here: https://www.myaccount.ubc.ca/myAccount/.

While Instructure has made the Canvas service available, UBC needs to review security measures prior to providing access for the UBC community.

We also recommend that faculty, staff, and students continue to be vigilant against phishing and follow best practices for protecting their accounts and data, including using strong passwords and enabling multi-factor authentication where available.

May 7, 19:08 PDT
Update - The university is working to maintain learning continuity for courses starting next week and will be contacting affected community members in the coming days.

We also recommend that faculty, staff, and students continue to be vigilant against phishing and follow best practices for protecting their accounts and data, including using strong passwords and enabling multi-factor authentication where available.

We will provide more updates as soon as we have them.

May 7, 19:08 PDT
Update - .

May 7, 13:57 PDT
Investigating - Canvas is unavailable due to a cyber breach of its parent company Instructure. UBC community members should not log into Canvas until further notice.

If you are logged in, please log out immediately and do not log back in until you are notified by UBC IT that is safe to do so. If you have logged in after 12 p.m. PT on Thursday, May 7, please change your CWL password immediately and reach out to security@ubc.ca.

We will provide more updates as soon as we have them.

entry.title: Student Communication Too (SCT) Maintenance May 7, 2026 10:00 - 11:00 PT
entry.content:
May 7, 11:00 PDT
Completed - The scheduled maintenance has been completed.

May 7, 10:00 PDT
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

May 1, 15:18 PDT
Scheduled - Deployment Details
Modified Infrastructure
ubc-iec--appian-web-ad-hoc-communications--1 (v1.0.16 → v1.0.17)
Related Tickets:
• EASD-28685 - Fix for freezing/lag on the Sender Role Assignment page.
• EASD-28691 - Fix for duplicate users appearing in the Custom Sender interface.
• ASD-1883 - Change default sender to "Own email", replacing the current "No-reply email" setting.

________________________________________


What is being deployed and why?
We are deploying minor fixes to the Custom Sender interface, including eliminating duplicate users, resolving freezing issues, and adjusting the default sender.

________________________________________
Expected Service Impact
During Maintenance (60 minutes):
No impacts, SCT will remain available.
After Maintenance:
• New features will be immediately available to staff members.

________________________________________
Key Improvements

SCT
Eliminates freezing issues, duplicate users, and updates the default sender for Staff Members.

________________________________________
Feature Change Summary
For Student Communication Tool (SCT)
Before:
• -Sender Role Assignment page experienced freezing/lag.
• -Duplicate users appeared in the Custom Sender interface.
• -Default sender was set to “Own email”.

After:
• -Freezing/lag issues resolved.
• -Duplicate users removed from the Custom Sender interface.
• -Default sender updated to “No-reply email”.
Questions or Concerns?
Graham Robinson | graham.robinson@ubc.ca

Detailed Release Plan: https://confluence.it.ubc.ca/x/VYVsGg

entry.title: UHF Two-Way Radio System Network Maintenance May 7, 2026 05:00 - 07:00 PT
entry.content:
May 7, 07:00 PDT
Completed - The scheduled maintenance has been completed.

May 7, 05:00 PDT
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

May 5, 14:47 PDT
Scheduled - UHF Two-Way Radio System Network will undergo network maintenance on May 7, 2026 05:00 - 07:00 PT and will require reboot as part of the change.
